email_opening: I have followed your work at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching and your focus on leaders moving from CEO scope into board and enterprise mandates.
email_body_core:
Hi Marshall,

I have been following your work at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching, and I thought this might be useful for the executives you support.

Starting Monday gives executive coaches a practical execution layer: target company intelligence, structured prep briefs, and outreach workflows that help senior candidates move with focus.

For CEO-to-Board leaders at Marshall Goldsmith Stakeholder Centered Coaching, the first 30 days usually need 3 things to line up: the target list, the prep brief, and the outreach cadence.

In the first 30 days, coaches usually see 3 outcomes: cleaner board-readiness, stronger strategic posture, and more credible executive momentum.

For CEO-to-Board clients, the biggest win is cleaner board-readiness signal and tighter strategic positioning in early conversations.

If useful, I can walk you through a 20-minute pilot with 3 success criteria and you can decide quickly if it fits.

Rich
